CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk RWoods. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Ashley Ernst, Esq. of Sommer Employment Law Group, P.C. (415-432-4372) for Plaintiffs and Opposing Parties
Danielle A. Hinton, Esq. of Ogletree Deakins (415-536-3403) for Defendants and Moving Parties

RULING - A R G U E D: DEFENDANTS WONDERBAR LLC and JAY SIEGAN'S Motion for a Protective Order Re Plaintiff's Propounded Discovery is granted in part. Each party's request for sanctions is denied. (See order for details.) Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Ernest Halperin; Clerk L. Fong; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
